pre_capture_js: (async function() { var buttons = document.querySelectorAll('button'); var availButtons = []; buttons.forEach(function(b) { if (b.textContent.trim().toLowerCase().includes('check availability')) { availButtons.push(b); } }); for (var i = 0; i < availButtons.length; i++) { availButtons[i].click(); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 500); }); } window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 1000); }); })()
